name: wdio-ag-grid
description: WebdriverIO helpers for interacting with AG Grid

scripts.test:all: npm run test:v33 && npm run test:v34 && npm run test:v35
scripts.test:watch: node --test --watch --test-concurrency=1 tests/ag-grid-data.v33.spec.js tests/ag-grid-data.v34.spec.js tests/ag-grid-data.v35.spec.js tests/ag-grid-elements.v33.spec.js tests/ag-grid-elements.v34.spec.js tests/ag-grid-elements.v35.spec.js tests/ag-grid-animation-wait.v35.spec.js

author: Kerry McKeever <kerry@kerrymckeever.com>
